Image.title: Image
Image.description: Metadata for an uploaded or imported image.

name.description: The name of the image file or a provided title.

url.description: The public URL of the image.

size.description: The human-readable size of the image (e.g., '1.2 MB').

userId.description: The UID of the user who added the image.

storagePath.description: The path to the file in Firebase Storage.

/images/{imageId}.description: A collection of images managed by users.
